The Problem

A broken system that
everyone ignores

Tipping exists in food delivery — but no one thinks about it. Riders are undervalued. Platforms miss revenue. Customers feel disconnected.

Dead Engagement Most users close the app the moment food arrives
Invisible Labour Riders complete 8–12 deliveries daily with no recognition
3%

Tipping Rate

Only 3 in 100 customers tip — and when they do, the amount is negligible

0

Rider Recognition

No system acknowledges top-performing delivery partners or rewards loyalty

₹∞

Lost Revenue

Billions in untapped platform revenue locked inside a broken tipping UX

User Experience

Great food,
invisible tipping

The food arrives. The user closes the app. That's it. No moment for appreciation, no prompt for connection, no reason to return.

🍕Pizza — Hot & Fast
Delivered in 28 min
🍔Burger — Fan Favourite
4.8 ★ Rating
🍜Biryani — #1 Ordered

💡
The Missed Moment
After every completed delivery, there's a 30-second window where the user's satisfaction is at its peak. TipRank captures this moment — gamifying appreciation before the app closes.
The Solution

TipRank
makes tipping
addictive

A gamified layer inside the delivery flow — leaderboards, rewards, badges — turning a passive tap into an emotional ritual.

🏆

Weekly Leaderboards

Top riders compete for recognition. Users see their impact. Platform earns loyalty from both sides.

🎖️

Rider Badges & Ranks

Elite Champion, Star Performer, Gold Rider — a progression system that drives rider retention and performance.

🎁

Tip-to-Reward Points

Every tip earns the customer reward points — Exciting Rewards, ,money,movie tickets, cashback — creating a loop that brings them back.

"
The Impact

Numbers that
change everything

5×

Increase in tipping frequency after gamification is introduced

Expected average tip rate — up from the current 3–5% baseline

40%

Higher rider retention when recognition programs are in place

2.3×

More repeat orders from users engaged in the rewards loop

Brand Impact

A platform people
feel good about

🤝

Stronger Rider Support

Riders earn real income boosts and recognition — reducing churn, improving morale, and creating a workforce that champions the brand.

💎

Positive Brand Perception

When users know tipping benefits riders directly, the platform becomes more than an app — it becomes a cause worth supporting.

❤️

Emotional User Connection

Gamified appreciation creates real human moments inside a transactional product — loyalty that can't be bought with discounts alone.
